title: coccinia barteri
intro: Coccinia barteri, also known as the West African ivy gourd, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cucurbitaceae. It is a perennial climber that has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Coccinia barteri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce cholesterol. Coccinia barteri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory and skin issues.
